purpose: Operating Package layered on top of the PBKR v4 Core Doctrine merged in PR #50. Adds AI project instructions, daily prompts (KR), JSON schemas, ticket templates, modelbook templates, and weekly review templates.

additions.purpose: Operating package README; scope, invariants, hard rules.
This manifest. Inventory + safety attestations.
Orchestrator role; merges candidates into a daily focus list; never executes.
Auditor role; hard / soft / missing-evidence / forbidden-signal vetoes.
News Grounder role; source tiering; Telegram-only candidates capped.
Human Gate role; pre-execution final checklist.
Journal Review role; post-session and weekly review; mistake taxonomy.
Pre-open planner (KR): regime read, leading groups, candidates, tactic candidates, TOR headroom.
Opening discovery (KR, 09:00-09:15): observe-only window.
Primary window (KR, 09:15-11:30): trigger / failure / stop / TOR / human gate check.
Close review (KR): holdings, candidates, risk, stop migration.
Post-close next-day prep (KR): next-day daily focus list of 1-5 names.
Event-risk recheck (KR): disclosures, designations, halts, CB / BW, contracts.
Common subschema: schema_version, asof, source_refs, signal-safety invariants.
MCS-KR stage / sub-grade / K / inputs.
Watchlist item: edge / setup / proximity / classification.
Daily focus list of 1-5 audited candidates.
Snipe-queue candidate within a session.
Trade ticket with edge / setup / entry tactic / trigger / failure / stop / size / sell rules / human gate.
Position update: stop migration / trim / structural exit / time stop.
Auditor output: hard / soft / missing / forbidden findings.
News Grounder output: source-tiered evidence.
Weekly review: process_adherence / rule_violations / modelbook_updates / expectancy_review / next_week_focus.
Pre-execution trade ticket template.
Pre-execution trade ticket JSON template.
Position management ticket template.
Position management ticket JSON template.
Audit ticket template (hard / soft / missing / forbidden).
No-action journal template; even idle days are logged.
Modelbook entry: closed or missed trade.
Modelbook index of entries.
Failure case review (loss / rule violation / chase / failed stop).
Best case review (good setup / good entry / good management).
Weekly review template.
Weekly review prompt (KR).

safety_notes: No engine code modified. Parser / bridge / merge / build / emit / ticker_map / Kiwoom / WiseReport / Drive scripts are out of scope and untouched.
No automated execution authorized. No agent, schema, or template emits a machine-actionable trade signal.
Market Cycle is an exposure dial only.
Human gate required before any execution.
No real PDF / screenshot / extracted text / output JSON / CSV committed.
No API key / token / password committed.
No real ticker name, real order, or real recommendation phrase introduced.
